description: You are a law professor conducting a systematic review on First Amendment free speech jurisprudence. Organize the 14 court cases in your Juris-M library into two collections: 'Included Studies' for free speech/First Amendment cases and 'Excluded Studies' for unrelated cases. Standardize the tagging for cases in 'Included Studies' by ensuring they are tagged only with 'free-speech', removing tags like 'First Amendment', 'expression', 'free speech', or 'hate speech'. For at least four included cases, attach a note of at least 40 words describing the case's holding. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.

free_speech_cases: Tinker v. Des Moines Independent Community School District
New York Times Co. v. Sullivan
R.A.V. v. City of St. Paul
Bethel School District No. 403 v. Fraser
excluded_cases: Palsgraf v. Long Island Railroad Co.
